title: Probe-not-predict live-verify (#784): first real 30B probe outside a job
methodology: tools.dispatch_harness.probe executor, live on merged main 8bea7c54; measure Available -> (if >= floor) stop resident 14B AO -> load 30B -> wait to serve on :8000 -> always restore AO. --json outcome, n=1 per condition. Coordinator dev-session ~2 GiB overhead present.

conditions.name: clean_happy_path
conditions.note: probe from the AO's own repo root; finds + tree-kills the live AO; 30B loads into FREED RAM; representative

conditions.name: co_resident_artifact
conditions.note: probe from a WORKTREE; wrong certs/ root -> no-lock-pid -> AO NOT stopped -> 30B loaded co-resident with the 14B; NOT representative, kept as honest contrast

not_measured: the probe under a real marginal-band battery admission (tonight's live exercise once the agentic admission merges)
cross_reference: PERFORMANCE_LOG.md 2026-07-10; #777 swap_gate_floor_2026-07-09 (~13s from 19.85 GiB ambient, consistent)
